name: Marwan Elgendy
current_status: Software engineer focused on platform architecture and data-intensive SaaS.
summary: Marwan builds production systems with clear boundaries, operable services, and end-to-end delivery. His work spans enterprise SaaS, identity, subscriptions, and data-intensive cloud platforms. He has shipped at IBM (Apptio/Cloudability), HP, JumpCloud, and AT&T.
strengths: Platform architecture and service boundary design
End-to-end delivery across ship, stabilize, and iterate
Operability with observability, alerting, and on-call discipline
tech_at_glance: AWS (Lambda, DynamoDB, SQS, API Gateway, SAM)
contact_preference: The contact form on this site is the preferred channel. Marwan reads every submission.
